product_name: Harry Potter Hogwarts Bumper Activity Set

bullets: GET CRAFTY - This Harry Potter themed Bumper Activity Set includes over 250 pieces so your young fan can stick, draw, stamp and create. With pens, gems, stickers and much much more, this set will provide hours of crafting fun!
GREAT GIFT - This extensive stationery and activities set makes a great Birthday or Christmas gift for any Harry Potter or Wizarding World fan with a super cool box and a helpful carry handle!
OFFICIAL LICENSED HARRY POTTER SET - This official art set comes with a Hogwarts themed box and colour-in Great Hall insert to extend the play time!

Includes: 250+ Assorted Craft Items including sticker rolls, washi tapes, felt tip pens,  coloured pencils, cardboard characters, cardboard tables, A4 colouring sheets, sheet stick on gems, sticker book, ink stampers, an ink pad and a sheet of foil stickers.
content.description: Get crafting with the 250+ piece Harry Potter Bumper Activity Set. The craft set includes cutout cardboard characters, ink stampers, felt tip pens, pencils, sticker book, foil stickers, washi tape, colouring sheets, stick-on gems and more! It even comes in a Hogwarts themed box, complete with a colour-in Great Hall insert!

attributes.whats_in_box: 250+ Assorted Crafts Items including Sticker Rolls, Washi Tapes, Felt Tip Pens, Coloured Pencils, Cardboard Characters, Cardboard Tables, A4 Colouring Sheets, Sticker Book, Ink Stampers and Foil Stickers

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
